subtasks.description: Scan IAM policies from AWS account for permissions, principal assignments, and policy attachment status
Query CloudTrail logs to extract API calls, actors, timestamps, resources, and success/failure status for audit trail analysis
Reconcile IAM policy scan results with CloudTrail audit logs to detect unauthorized actions, policy violations, anomalous patterns, and classify violation severity
Generate structured compliance report including violation findings, risk assessment, remediation recommendations, and executive summary

plan.cost_rationale: Four-subtask plan: (1) IAM policy scan via SQL (multi-table join of policy documents, principals, attachments) requires mid-tier complexity; (2) CloudTrail audit via MongoDB (aggregation across event logs with multiple filter stages) requires mid-tier; (3) Violation detection via cross_recon reconciles two distinct sources (IAM state + CloudTrail history) with pattern analysis and severity classification, requires frontier-tier reasoning to identify subtle violations and correlate evidence; (4) Compliance report generation via cross_recon synthesizes violation findings into structured output with recommendations, mid-tier sufficient as it consumes upstream frontier analysis. Four subtasks are minimal: cannot reduce further without losing critical security audit coverage (policy scan, log audit, violation detection, reporting are distinct phases with different source systems).

output.sql: SELECT permission, resource, action, result, COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS distinct_users FROM access_log_facts GROUP BY permission, resource, action, result ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC

mongo_value.task: Generate structured compliance report including violation findings, risk assessment, remediation recommendations, and executive summary

executive_summary.recommendation: Upstream violation_check returned empty reconciled set; re-run full audit pipeline with verified data sources before drawing compliance conclusions

violation_findings.note: No violation data returned from upstream violation_check reconciliation

remediation_recommendations.action: Verify IAM policy scanner connectivity and re-execute scan
remediation_recommendations.rationale: Empty upstream output suggests scanner may not have run or returned no results

remediation_recommendations.action: Confirm CloudTrail log ingestion pipeline is active and logs are being forwarded
remediation_recommendations.rationale: No historical SQL records indicate possible logging gap or ingestion failure

remediation_recommendations.action: Re-run violation_check with explicit scope boundaries and time window
remediation_recommendations.rationale: Empty reconciled set from violation_check invalidates downstream compliance report accuracy

remediation_recommendations.action: Establish baseline compliance snapshot before next audit cycle
remediation_recommendations.rationale: Without baseline, deviation analysis and trend reporting are not possible

remediation_recommendations.action: Implement automated alerting for empty or null upstream audit outputs
remediation_recommendations.rationale: Silent failures in audit pipelines produce false compliance assurance
